root.m_Talk_ENG: You look so out of it. It's not like you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You look so out of it. It's not like you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You look so out of it. It's not like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... Am I...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... Am I...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... Am I...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know, Sasha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know, Sasha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know, Sasha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? For what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? For what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? For what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know... you saved me, remember?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know... you saved me, remember?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know... you saved me, remember?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you always made me feel happy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you always made me feel happy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you always made me feel happy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... I decided that I want to continue being by your side.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... I decided that I want to continue being by your side.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... I decided that I want to continue being by your side.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll eat, collect junk, and help out the militia together...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll eat, collect junk, and help out the militia together...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll eat, collect junk, and help out the militia together...

root.m_Talk_ENG: After work, we'll watch the Town Soldiers of Bremen and sleep...
root.m_Talk_DEU: After work, we'll watch the Town Soldiers of Bremen and sleep...
root.m_Talk_FRA: After work, we'll watch the Town Soldiers of Bremen and sleep...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be together forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be together forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be together forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Forever... and happy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Forever... and happy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Forever... and happy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What do you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What do you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What do you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks... for saying that to me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks... for saying that to me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks... for saying that to me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think... it's a really good idea...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think... it's a really good idea...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think... it's a really good idea...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hugs!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hugs!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hugs!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! You shouldn't charge into people like that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! You shouldn't charge into people like that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! You shouldn't charge into people like that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I really wanted to hug you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I really wanted to hug you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I really wanted to hug you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ehehe... I'm not letting you go today!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ehehe... I'm not letting you go today!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ehehe... I'm not letting you go today!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to stay like this for the rest of the day!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to stay like this for the rest of the day!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to stay like this for the rest of the day!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine... But it's only for today, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fine... But it's only for today, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fine... But it's only for today, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay!
